message:
fix: Comptime mutability and unused allocator warnings

Agent 1: Fixed comptime const/var declaration bug (assign.zig)
Agent 2: Fixed unused allocator for pure array code (analyzer.zig)
Agent 3: Verified test recovery to baseline

Fixes:
- Comptime path now checks isMutated() before declaring const/var ✅
- emitComptimeAssignment() accepts is_mutable parameter ✅
- Analyzer detects constant homogeneous lists (skip allocator) ✅
- Only create allocator when actually needed (ArrayLists) ✅

Impact:
- for_loop.py: var sum instead of const sum (mutation works) ✅
- while_loop.py: var count (loop counters work) ✅
- fixed_arrays.py: No unused allocator warnings ✅
- Pure array code: No allocator created ✅

Test results: 46/98 passing (47%, BASELINE RECOVERED)
- Before: 29/98 (30%)
- After: 46/98 (47%)
- Recovery: +17 tests ✅

File sizes: assign.zig 503 lines, analyzer.zig 216 lines ✅
Build: Clean ✅
